purpose: Create a stronger Shuangji female face / upper-body identity anchor before another SHOT-02-V012 video attempt.
why_needed: SHOT-02-V010 and SHOT-02-V011 both failed Shuangji identity stability. V011 used all intended references but still drifted, so the next step is a clearer identity anchor rather than another direct video attempt.

input_reference.duty: Preserve Shuangji identity, female face, silver-blue high ponytail, blue-silver armor, white-blue robe panels, and restrained wuxia temperament. Do not copy full-body pose or background.

output_intent: Clear upper-body / portrait identity reference with strong facial readability for future V012 video identity protection.
not_for: locked production asset before human review
expected_future_use: If approved by human review, use as highest-priority Shuangji identity reference in a later SHOT-02-V012 package.
